figures.caption: Fig. 1: Our method constructs the merged model tailored to the target environment according to the preference vector nT generated by dataset similarity, while MAGMAX [14] constructs the merged model that works well on all training tasks on average.

Fig. 3: Top-1 accuracy for the first and last tasks on CIFAR-100-5 (left), -20 (center), -50 (right) with the preference vectors in (8) and (9) parametrized by α. The mean and standard deviation over three runs are plotted for each setting.
